hypothesis: Pretraining the multimodal contrastive model with multiple DFT-derived low-energy conformers per SMILES (all contrasted to the same symbolic anchor) will induce embeddings that are invariant to both SO(3) rotations and conformational variation—manifested by significantly higher Accuracy@10 in retrieval of unseen conformers versus single-conformer pretraining and by at least a 50% reduction in intra-molecular embedding variance across conformers.
